title: T-039 — Scanner LP inventory query API
prompt:
# T-039 — Scanner LP inventory query API

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §13.1 (FR-WH-025).
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`GET /api/warehouse/scanner/inventory` returning paginated LP inventory rows for the scanner with SLO <200ms P95.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/inventory/route.ts`. Query params per §13.1: warehouse_id (required), product_id, status (default 'available'), qa_status (CSV default 'PASSED,RELEASED'), location_id, offset, limit (default 50). Response includes lp_id, lp_number, product_code, product_name, quantity, uom, catch_weight_kg, location_path, expiry_date, qa_status, batch_number, reserved_for_wo_id. Use idx_lp_fefo composite when applicable.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/inventory/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/inventory/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a warehouse with 100 LPs and request ?warehouse_id=X, when endpoint is hit, then 50 rows are returned with `total=100, offset=0, limit=50`.
2. Given qa_status=PASSED,RELEASED is the default, when an LP with HOLD is in the warehouse, then it is excluded from the response.
3. Given a 10k-row seed, when measured, then P95 latency <200ms.

## Test strategy
- RED: inventory route.test.ts covers pagination, qa_status filter, latency.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test scanner-inventory`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not return >limit rows.
- Do not bypass tenant_id RLS.
- Do not skip qa_status filter.

pipeline_inputs.description: Paginated LP inventory query for scanner with default qa filter.
pipeline_inputs.details: Index-driven query; default qa filter PASSED,RELEASED; SLO <200ms P95.
acceptance_criteria: Given 100 LPs in a warehouse, when ?warehouse_id=X is requested, then 50 rows are returned with total=100
Given default qa_status filter, when an LP has HOLD, then it is excluded
Given a 10k-row seed, when measured, then P95 latency <200ms
test_strategy: RED: scanner-inventory route.test.ts covers pagination, qa filter, latency
